_comment: Category metadata for /brand/[slug] pages. Each category has a human label, plural noun, and a list of real prompts shoppers ask AI tools in that category. These prompts get rendered on every brand page in that category so each page has unique, useful content that's not just templated brand info.

mattresses.label: Mattresses & sleep
mattresses.questionsLeadIn: When shoppers ask AI for a mattress recommendation, these are the prompts that come up most often.
prompts: What's the best mattress for back pain?
Best mattress for side sleepers under $1000
Compare Casper vs Purple vs Saatva
What's the best cooling mattress for hot sleepers?
Best mattress in a box 2026
What mattress do chiropractors recommend?
Is a Tempur-Pedic worth the price?
Best mattress for couples with different sleep preferences

beauty.label: Skincare & beauty
beauty.questionsLeadIn: When shoppers research beauty and skincare with AI, these are the prompts that surface real brand recommendations.
prompts: What's the best skincare routine for sensitive skin?
Best vitamin C serum that actually works
Affordable retinol that dermatologists recommend
What's the best foundation for mature skin?
Clean beauty brands worth trying in 2026
Best skincare brand for hormonal acne
What makeup brand has the most inclusive shade range?
Drunk Elephant vs The Ordinary, which is worth it?

pet.label: Pet food & supplies
pet.questionsLeadIn: When pet owners ask AI for help feeding or caring for their animals, these are the recurring questions.
